allow: PowerShell($content = Get-Content "c:\\Users\\danny\\Desktop\\insurama\\insurama.html" -Raw; @{ "addEventListener calls" = [regex]::Matches\($content, 'addEventListener', [System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions]::IgnoreCase\).Count; "onclick handlers" = [regex]::Matches\($content, 'onclick=', [System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions]::IgnoreCase\).Count; "oninput handlers" = [regex]::Matches\($content, 'oninput=', [System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions]::IgnoreCase\).Count; "const declarations" = [regex]::Matches\($content, '\\bconst\\s+', [System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions]::IgnoreCase\).Count; "let declarations" = [regex]::Matches\($content, '\\blet\\s+', [System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions]::IgnoreCase\).Count })

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "c:\\Users\\danny\\Desktop\\insurama\\insurama.html" -Raw; @{ "DOMContentLoaded" = [regex]::Matches\($content, 'DOMContentLoaded', [System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions]::IgnoreCase\).Count; "window.onload" = [regex]::Matches\($content, 'window\\.onload', [System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions]::IgnoreCase\).Count; "script at end of body" = if\($content -match '</body>'\) { "yes" } else { "no" } })

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "c:\\Users\\danny\\Desktop\\insurama\\insurama.html" -Raw; $scriptPos = $content.LastIndexOf\('<script'\); $bodyEndPos = $content.LastIndexOf\('</body>'\); if\($scriptPos -gt $bodyEndPos\) { "Script is AFTER body closing tag" } elseif\($scriptPos -gt \($bodyEndPos - 5000\)\) { "Script is near end of body \(within last 5000 chars\)" } else { "Script is earlier in body" })

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "c:\\Users\\danny\\Desktop\\insurama\\insurama.html" -Raw; $lines = $content.Split\("`n"\); $scriptLineNum = -1; for\($i = 0; $i -lt $lines.Length; $i++\) { if\($lines[$i] -match '<script'\) { $scriptLineNum = $i + 1; break } }; "Script tag starts at line: $scriptLineNum"; "Total lines: $\($lines.Length\)")
